zh.Soleto, Lecce, Puglia, Italy: 義大利普格利亞特拉 達特朗托索爾托
zh.Nola, Naples, Campania, Italy: 義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里諾拉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anastasia de Monfort於1275年出生在義大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里諾拉時，她的父親Guido di Monforte33歲，母親Margherita Aldobrandeschi20歲。她於1293年7月8日與Romano Orsini結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.Nola, Naples, Campania, Italy: 意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里諾拉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anastasia de Monfort于1275年出生在意大利坎帕尼亞拿坡里諾拉时，她的父亲Guido di Monforte33岁，母亲Margherita Aldobrandeschi20岁。她于1293年7月8日与Romano Orsini结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Monfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Montfort
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Mont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Juan, Cristina, Domingo, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Mariano, Ramon, Trinidad.
Catalan and French: topographic name for a mountain dweller, from Catalan and (Old) French mont ‘mountain’ (from Latin mons, genitive montis). Compare French Demont and Dumont .

nameMeanings.name: Anastasia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek male name Anastasios (a derivative of anastasis ‘resurrection’). It has always been popular in Eastern Europe, in honour of a 4th-century saint who was martyred at Sirmium in Dalmatia. It was also used occasionally in England in the Middle Ages and as late as the 17th century; more recently it has made a considerable comeback. One of the daughters of the last tsar of Russia bore this name. She was murdered by the Bolsheviks in 1918 , along with the rest of her family, but in 1920 a woman claiming to be the Romanov princess Anastasia came to public notice in Germany, and a film was later based on this story ( 1956 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Anastasia de Monfort was born in 1275, in Nola, Naples, Campania, Italy, her father, Guido di Monforte, was 33 and her mother, Margherita Aldobrandeschi, was 20. She married Romano Orsini on 8 July 1293. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anastasia de Monfort est née en 1275, à Nola, Napoli, Campania, Italie, son père, Guido di Monforte, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margherita Aldobrandeschi, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Romano Orsini le 8 juillet 1293. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anastasia de Monfort 1275 in Nola, Napoli, Campania, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guido di Monforte 33 und ihre Mutter Margherita Aldobrandeschi 20. Sie hat am 8. Juli 1293 Romano Orsini geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anastasia de Monfort è nata il nel 1275 nel Nola, Napoli, Campania, Italia, sua padre, Guido di Monforte, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margherita Aldobrandeschi, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Romano Orsini il 8 luglio 1293. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.Soleto, Lecce, Puglia, Italy: イタリアプウグリアテラ ド'オトラントーソレトー
ja.Nola, Naples, Campania, Italy: イタリアカンプアニアナポリノラ
ja.lifeSummary: Anastasia de Monfortが1275年にイタリアカンプアニアナポリノラで生まれた時，父Guido di Monforteは33歳，母Margherita Aldobrandeschiは20歳であった。1293年7月8日にRomano Orsiniと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anastasia de Monfort(이)가 1275년 이탈리아 캠파니아 나폴리 노라에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guido di Monforte(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margherita Aldobrandeschi(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1293년 7월 8일 Romano Orsini(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anastasia de Monfort nasceu em 1275, em Nola, Napoli, Campania, Itália, seu pai, Guido di Monforte, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margherita Aldobrandeschi, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Romano Orsini em 8 de julho de 1293. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anastasia de Monfort родилась в 1275 г. в местности нола, наполи, кампаня, Италия, её отцу по имени Guido di Monforte было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margherita Aldobrandeschi, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Romano Orsini 8 июля 1293 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anastasia de Monfort nació en 1275, en Nola, Napoli, Campania, Italia, su papá, Guido di Monforte, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margherita Aldobrandeschi, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Romano Orsini el 8 de julio de 1293. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
